findings.description: The signature block is duplicated: the scanned signature image includes 'Sincerely,', the handwritten signature, 'Judith A. Wehner', and 'Assistant State Mining Spe…', and all of these also appear as separate HTML text elements. A reader encounters the same content twice.
findings.evidence: PDF page 2 shows 'Sincerely,' once, followed by a handwritten signature, then the printed name and title. HTML chunk 4 shows 'Sincerely,' as text, then an image of the full signature block (containing 'Sincerely,' + signature + name + title), then 'Judith A. Wehner' and 'Assistant State Mining Specialist' again as text.
